goal: The desktop home widget showcase band (.mtd-widband) showed a FAKE browser mockup (.mtd-fakeart blog + .mtd-embed placeholder card). Show the REAL interactive widget instead.
done: Replaced the fake browser body in .mtd-widband with a real live widget iframe inside the same browser chrome (kept the .mtd-browser__bar + cozyhomeblog URL for the 'embedded on your site' story). EN -> /widget.html?promo=1, TH -> /widget.html?promo=1&lang=th (promo=1 makes the widget's footer CTA drive site-owners to /widgets/ rather than self-link). Removed aria-hidden from .mtd-browser so the interactive iframe is reachable; kept it on the decorative bar. Added css/desktop-home.css rules .mtd-browser__body--live + .mtd-widframe (540px tall, full width, brand gradient bg). Desktop-only (band lives in .mtd-home, shown >=1024px) so mobile + iOS untouched.
verified: Headless render of index.html at 1440px: the band's right panel now shows the real widget (MeowTarot brand, Single/Past-Present-Future chips, and the 7-card fanned pick board) inside the browser frame; left marketing column unchanged.
